SavedStudyGuide.title: SavedStudyGuide
SavedStudyGuide.description: A study guide saved by a user.

userId.description: The UID of the user who saved the guide.

topic.description: The topic of the study guide.

keyStageName.description: The name of the Key Stage.

savedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the guide was saved.

Feedback.title: Feedback
Feedback.description: User feedback on a specific study material.

userId.description: The UID of the user providing feedback.

materialTitle.description: The title of the material being rated.

isPositive.description: True if thumbs up, false if thumbs down.
